name: Share Sheet & Social Sharing (ShareLink / UIActivityViewController)
promptInjection:
CAPABILITY: Share Sheet & Social Sharing

TWO APPROACHES (use ShareLink for iOS 16+, UIActivityViewController for broader compatibility):

OPTION 1 — ShareLink (SwiftUI native, iOS 16+, PREFERRED):
- ShareLink(item: url) — share a URL.
- ShareLink(item: text) — share a string.
- ShareLink(item: image, preview: SharePreview("Title", image: image)) — share an Image.
- Custom label: ShareLink(item: url) { Label("Share", systemImage: "square.and.arrow.up") }
- For custom types: conform to Transferable protocol.

Sharing a rendered UIImage with ShareLink:
  ShareLink(item: Image(uiImage: renderedImage), preview: SharePreview("My Image", image: Image(uiImage: renderedImage)))

OPTION 2 — UIActivityViewController (UIKit, all iOS versions):
- Wrap in UIViewControllerRepresentable.
- Pass items: [Any] — can include String, URL, UIImage, Data.
- Present via .sheet(isPresented:) { ActivityView(items: [...]) }

GENERATING SHAREABLE IMAGES (common requirement):
- Use SwiftUI's ImageRenderer (iOS 16+) to render a View to UIImage:
  let renderer = ImageRenderer(content: myView)
  renderer.scale = UIScreen.main.scale
  if let image = renderer.uiImage { ... }
- For older iOS, use UIGraphicsImageRenderer to draw content.

COPY TO CLIPBOARD:
- UIPasteboard.general.string = text
- UIPasteboard.general.image = image
- Show a toast/confirmation after copying.

SHARING FILES:
- Write data to a temporary file, then share the file URL.
- let tempURL = FileManager.default.temporaryDirectory.appendingPathComponent("export.pdf")
- try data.write(to: tempURL)
- Share tempURL via ShareLink or UIActivityViewController.

ANTI-PATTERNS:
- Do NOT present UIActivityViewController directly from SwiftUI without wrapping in UIViewControllerRepresentable.
- Do NOT forget the preview parameter when sharing images with ShareLink (it shows a blank preview otherwise).
- Do NOT share large files synchronously on the main thread — generate them in a background task first.
- Do NOT confuse ShareLink with SharePlay (GroupActivities) — they are completely different APIs.
- Do NOT use ShareLink for iOS 15 targets — it's iOS 16+ only. Use UIActivityViewController wrapper for broader compatibility.

COMPILER: NSAttributedString.Key.foregroundStyle does not exist — use .foregroundColor (or AttributeScopes.SwiftUI). For ForEach, use ForEach(items, id: \.id) { item in ... }; do not pass a plain array where a Binding is expected (fixes 'generic parameter C could not be inferred' / 'cannot convert to Binding<C>').
antiPatterns: Presenting UIActivityViewController directly from SwiftUI without UIViewControllerRepresentable wrapper
Forgetting SharePreview when sharing images with ShareLink (blank preview)
Generating large shareable files on the main thread
Using ShareLink when targeting iOS 15 (it requires iOS 16+)

commonErrors: cannot convert value of type '[CardTheme]' to expected argument type 'Binding<C>'
generic parameter 'C' could not be inferred
cannot convert value of type 'Binding<C.Element>' to expected argument type 'CardTheme'
cannot convert value of type 'Binding<Subject>' to expected argument type '[Color]'
for-in loop requires 'AsyncStream<[RecognizedItem]>' to conform to 'Sequence'
